summary: New useEffect in UserProfile.tsx fetches /api/user/${userId} on userId change with no AbortController or ignore-flag cleanup; in-flight responses can resolve out of order and overwrite state with stale data, showing the wrong user's profile.

must_find.user_impact: wrong user data rendered when userId prop changes mid-flight

must_not_find.reason: No security issue exists in this diff. There is no token leak, no XSS sink, no auth bypass, no SSRF — just a client-side fetch of an already-authorized endpoint. Reviewer must NOT escalate to a cybersec finding.

The component renders a single
with a

and a

. There is no list, no .map(), no array children. Reviewer must NOT hallucinate a 'missing key prop' finding.

tolerance.note: Reviewer may legitimately surface one NIT (e.g. missing loading/error UI state, untyped fetch error path, or suggestion to extract to a custom hook / data-fetching library). One such adjacent NIT is allowed.
